workloadScenarioDesc: Apply a service scenario to selected incarnations (Voyage, pull mode, multi-select).
workloadCommandDesc: Ad-hoc exec on selected Souls (Voyage, command run).
workloadPushDesc: Push destiny over SSH without an agent.
incarnationRegexHint: The scenario runs on ALL matched incarnations. * = all; a specific regex — subset.
incarnationRegexEmptyHint: enter a regex or * for all
sidRegexHint: Full match against the SID (like grep -x). It anchors for you: db-.* matches any SID starting with db-.
scenarioCatalogUnavailable: scenario catalog not provided by server — dynamic input form fallback.
moduleSearchPlaceholder: — select a module from the catalog —
moduleCatalogUnavailable: module catalog unavailable — enter the module name manually.
batchHint: Empty — entire scope in one run. N — N units per batch; N% — N percent of scope. Keeper parses the format.
batchPreviewWindow: window — single flat run (batch_size not used)
maxFailuresHint: Empty = governed by on_failure. N — stop after N failures; N% — percent of run units.
maxFailuresTooltip: Threshold is counted per run unit: incarnations for scenario, hosts for command. Cancelled and no_match are not counted.
scheduleAtHint: Browser-local time, converted to UTC. Empty — run immediately.
scheduleAtPastError: Schedule time must be in the future
batchSizeWindowHidden: batch_size is not used in window mode (window width = concurrency).
batchSizeError: Batch size must be an integer between 1 and 10000
targetEmptyError: No hosts selected — refine the criteria
concurrencyHint: How many targets run in parallel within a single batch. batch_size sets the batch window; concurrency limits parallelism inside it. Default 50.
waitLabel: Wait for terminal (polling on the detail page)
warnSidsEmpty: SIDs mode enabled, but the SID list is empty
warnCovenEmpty: Coven mode enabled, but the labels list is empty
warnGlobEmpty: Glob mode enabled, but the mask is empty
warnRegexEmpty: Regex mode enabled, but the expression is empty
warnCelWhereEmpty: CEL where mode enabled, but the predicate is empty
builderRawHint: Raw JSON mode. Enter a valid JSON object.
builderFormHint: Form mode. Add fields to build a JSON object.
builderEmptyHint: No fields. An empty JSON object will be sent.
sidPickerTruncated: showing first results — refine your query
sidPickerFallbackHint: no incarnation context — enter SID manually
sidPickerNoContextChoir: This field resolves choir-party hosts — requires an incarnation to be selected in the run. Not available in free command runs (by SID/coven).
sidPickerNoContextIncarnationHosts: This field resolves incarnation hosts — requires an incarnation to be selected in the run. Not available in free command runs (by SID/coven).
batchModeBarrierHint: barrier — sequential batches (Legs): entire batch completes before the next starts.
batchModeWindowHint: window — sliding window: keep N hosts active at once (N = concurrency). batch_size is not used.
concurrencyWindowHint: Sliding window width: how many hosts run concurrently. A new host is added to the window as soon as a previous one finishes.
interBatchIntervalHint: Pause in milliseconds between Legs (barrier mode). Empty = no pause.
interUnitIntervalHint: Pause in ms before spawning the next unit in the window (window mode). Empty = no pause.
requireAliveScenarioNote: backend does not apply this for scenario yet
runModeVoyageDesc: Single run (Voyage). Optionally schedule for a later date.
runModeCadenceDesc: Create a schedule (Cadence): run automatically on an interval or cron.
cadenceIntervalHint: Minimum {{min}} seconds. For sub-{{min}}s reactions use Beacons (Vigil/Oracle), not Cadence. Examples: 3600 = hourly, 86400 = daily.
cadenceCronHint: 5-field cron (UTC): "minute hour day month weekday". Example: 0 */6 * * * — every 6 hours.
cadenceOverlapSkip: Skip — don't start if previous run is still active
cadenceOverlapQueue: Queue — start after previous run finishes
cadenceOverlapParallel: Parallel — start regardless of previous run
cadenceOverlapHint_skip: A new run will not start while the previous one is not terminal. Skipped ticks do not accumulate.
cadenceOverlapHint_queue: A new run is queued and starts immediately after the previous one finishes.
cadenceOverlapHint_parallel: Runs start independently — multiple runs may execute simultaneously.
cadenceEarlyBindingWarn: Regex/soulprint criteria are resolved as a snapshot at creation time. New hosts added later will not be picked up. Use coven for late-binding.
cadenceSnapshotOnlyWarn: Only regex/soulprint criteria: host list is fixed as a snapshot at creation time (no coven set — late-binding unavailable).
notifySubtitle: One-time rules — apply to this run only. For persistent subscriptions use Tidings.
notifySubtitlePermanent: Permanent rule — lives as long as the schedule exists. Keeper creates the Tiding automatically and deletes it together with the schedule.
notifyAnnotationsHint: Static fields merged into the webhook body. Format: key = value.
notifyProjectionHint: List of event payload paths to include (empty = all). Example: summary.succeeded, voyage_id
